positive: A mystical, stylized forest scene viewed through a stained-glass window. The main subject is a pair of highly detailed, elegant, woodland creatures (a fox and an owl) sitting on a moss-covered log, rendered in a deep indigo and emerald color palette. The style should be inspired by Art Nouveau etchings and stained glass, emphasizing strong black outlines, vibrant jewel tones, and geometric floral elements. The composition must be centralized, symmetrical, and highly contrasting, designed as a repeating circular pattern or panel for apparel. Include silhouettes of bioluminescent mushrooms and stylized ferns for depth. Full composition, cinematic lighting, high contrast, vector art quality, suitable for screen printing.
negative: low resolution, blurry, text, watermark, signature, logo, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, jpeg artifacts, muted colors, gradient, photorealism, sketch, cartoon
